! Title: Sieve
! Expires: 1 days
! Updated: Wed Apr 15 14:30:23 UTC 2026
!
! --- https://codeberg.org/rossabaker/github-copilot-filters/raw/branch/main/filters.txt (license: CC0-1.0) ---
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2025 Ross A. Baker <ross@rossabaker.com>
#
# SPDX-License-Identifier: CC0-1.0

# General blunt force rules.  Use :not when the generic rules are
# wrapping content that we do need to see.
github.com##[href^="https://copilot-workspace.githubnext.com"]
github.com##[href^="/copilot"]
github.com##[class*="Copilot"]
github.com##[class*="copilot"]:not([class="copilot-chat-enabled"])
github.com##[id*="copilot"]:not([id="copilot-button-positioner"])
github.com##[data-value="Chat with Copilot"]
github.com##[data-hovercard-type="copilot"]

# Hides the "Agents" button in the repo navigation panel
github.com##nav[aria-label="Repository"] span[data-content="Agents"]:upward(2)

# Hides Copilot as a suggested reviewer on PRs and issues.  The typo
# in the id is intentional, and the ID is a magic number.
github.com##[id="suggested-reviewier-175728472"]

# Hide the "explain error" on the Actions details mennu
github.com##li[aria-keyshortcuts="e"]:has(svg[class*="copilot"])

# Button below text area on New Issue page
github.com##button:has-text("Write with Copilot")

# Appears just below a PR description as "Mention @copilot in a comment..."
github.com##.js-discussion .Stack:has(svg.octicon-copilot)

# Hide agent sessions on the dashboard
github.com##div.dashboard h3:has-text("Agent sessions"):upward(3)

# Buttons appear hovering over pull request or issue on the dashboard
# A button and span are siblings, whose behavior varies by browser.
# The :upward(1) hides the containing div that hides all actions.
# This _could_ include desired actions, but only unwanted Copilot
# actions have been observed in the wild.
github.com##div.dashboard span:has-text("Assign to Copilot"):upward(1)
github.com##div.dashboard span:has-text("Open in Copilot Chat"):upward(1)

# Hide changelog entries that mention Copilot from the homepage
# https://codeberg.org/rossabaker/github-copilot-filters/pulls/18
github.com##.dashboard-changelog li:has(a[href*="copilot"])

# Hide Copilot settings from the user navigation drawer
# https://codeberg.org/rossabaker/github-copilot-filters/pulls/19
github.com##div[aria-labelledby="global-user-nav-drawer-header"] li:has(> a[href="/settings/copilot"])

# On issues and PR page, under assignees
github.com##button:has(span:has-text("Assign to Copilot"))

# Popup when opening a pull request: "Copilot can review pull requests"
github.com##[data-analytics-visible*="copilot_code_review"]

# On CodeQL issues, offers to fix it with Copilot above the code
github.com##a:has-text("Copilot Autofix for CodeQL"):upward(3)

# Blocks requests made on loading the new homepage
# https://codeberg.org/rossabaker/github-copilot-filters/pulls/17
||github.com/github-copilot/chat^
